name: Stellar Global Supplies Dashboard
description: CloudWatch Logs & Metrics forwarded via GitHub Actions to New Relic

pages.name: Overview
pages.description: High-level AWS health across all services

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.lambda.Invocations.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.lambda.Errors.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.lambda.Errors.Sum`) / sum(`aws.lambda.Invocations.Sum`) * 100 AS 'Error Rate %' FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT average(`aws.lambda.Duration.Average`) FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.lambda.Throttles.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT max(`aws.lambda.ConcurrentExecutions.Maximum`) FROM Metric FACET function_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.apigateway.Count.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET api_id SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.apigateway.4XXError.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET api_id SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.apigateway.5XXError.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET api_id SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(`aws.apigateway.Latency.Average`) FROM Metric FACET api_id SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(`aws.apigateway.IntegrationLatency.Average`) FROM Metric FACET api_id SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

pages.name: S3
pages.description: S3 bucket storage (direct enumeration) and request metrics (24h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(`aws.s3.BucketSizeBytes.Direct`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Total Objects per Bucket — Latest  [direct enumeration]

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(`aws.s3.NumberOfObjects.Direct`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT sum(`aws.s3.GetRequests.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.s3.PutRequests.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.s3.DeleteRequests.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.s3.4xxErrors.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.s3.5xxErrors.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET bucket SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

pages.name: DynamoDB
pages.description: DynamoDB table capacity, item counts, and performance

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.ConsumedReadCapacityUnits.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.ConsumedWriteCapacityUnits.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.ThrottledRequests.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.ReadThrottleEvents.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.WriteThrottleEvents.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(`aws.dynamodb.SuccessfulRequestLatency.Average`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.SystemErrors.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(`aws.dynamodb.UserErrors.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT average(`aws.dynamodb.ProvisionedReadCapacityUnits.Average`) AS 'Provisioned Read', average(`aws.dynamodb.ConsumedReadCapacityUnits.Sum`) AS 'Consumed Read' FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT average(`aws.dynamodb.ProvisionedWriteCapacityUnits.Average`) AS 'Provisioned Write', average(`aws.dynamodb.ConsumedWriteCapacityUnits.Sum`) AS 'Consumed Write' FROM Metric FACET table SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

pages.name: Logs
pages.description: CloudWatch logs forwarded from all log groups with log_level filtering

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' FACET log_group SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT count(*) AS 'Total Events' FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT uniqueCount(log_group) AS 'Log Groups' FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' AND log_group LIKE '/aws/lambda/%' FACET log_group SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' AND (message LIKE '%ERROR%' OR message LIKE '%Exception%' OR message LIKE '%error%') FACET log_group SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT timestamp, log_group, log_stream, log_level, message FROM Log WHERE forwarder = 'github-actions' SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 100

pages.name: Step Functions
pages.description: AWS Step Functions state machine executions (last 24h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsStarted.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsSucceeded.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsFailed.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsSucceeded.Sum`) / sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsStarted.Sum`) * 100 AS 'Success Rate %' FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsAborted.Sum`) AS 'Aborted', sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsTimedOut.Sum`) AS 'Timed Out' FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionThrottled.Sum`) FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT average(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionTime.Average`) FROM Metric FACET state_machine_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsStarted.Sum`) AS 'Started', sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsSucceeded.Sum`) AS 'Succeeded', sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsFailed.Sum`) AS 'Failed', sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsAborted.Sum`) AS 'Aborted', sum(`aws.stepfunctions.ExecutionsTimedOut.Sum`) AS 'Timed Out' FROM Metric SINCE 24 hours ago

pages.name: Supabase
pages.description: Supabase Postgres metrics collected hourly via GitHub Actions

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(`supabase.db.size_bytes`) AS 'DB Size (bytes)' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT latest(`supabase.connections.total`) AS 'Total Connections' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT latest(`supabase.connections.by_state`) AS 'Active' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' AND state = 'active' SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT latest(`supabase.connections.by_state`) AS 'Idle in Txn' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' AND state = 'idle_in_transaction' SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT latest(`supabase.connections.by_state`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET state SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT latest(`supabase.db.size_bytes`) AS 'DB Size (bytes)' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' SINCE 7 days ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT latest(`supabase.table.live_rows`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT latest(`supabase.table.dead_rows`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT sum(`supabase.table.rows_inserted`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`supabase.table.rows_updated`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT sum(`supabase.table.rows_deleted`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT latest(`supabase.table.total_size_bytes`) FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 2 hours ago

widgets.title: Sequential vs Index Scans per Table

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`supabase.table.seq_scans`) AS 'Seq Scans', sum(`supabase.table.idx_scans`) AS 'Index Scans' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET table_name SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT sum(`supabase.bgwriter.checkpoints_timed`) AS 'Timed', sum(`supabase.bgwriter.checkpoints_req`) AS 'Requested' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

SELECT sum(`supabase.bgwriter.buffers_checkpoint`) AS 'Checkpoint', sum(`supabase.bgwriter.buffers_clean`) AS 'Clean', sum(`supabase.bgwriter.buffers_backend`) AS 'Backend', sum(`supabase.bgwriter.buffers_alloc`) AS 'Allocated' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' SINCE 24 hours ago TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Top 10 Slowest Queries — Mean Exec Time (ms)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(`supabase.statements.mean_exec_time_ms`) AS 'Mean (ms)', sum(`supabase.statements.calls`) AS 'Calls', sum(`supabase.statements.rows`) AS 'Rows' FROM Metric WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' FACET query SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 10
SELECT timestamp, message, sent, failed, duration_s, total_collected FROM Log WHERE `service.name` = 'supabase-monitor' AND logtype = 'supabase_monitor_run' SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 50

pages.name: Overview
pages.description: Monthly and daily cost summary across all AWS services

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.summary.monthly_total`) AS 'Total Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' SINCE 2 days ago

widgets.title: Top Service by Cost This Month

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.summary.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 1
SELECT uniqueCount(service_name) AS 'Services' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT latest(billing_period) AS 'Period' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.total_cost`) AS 'Daily Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.summary.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' FACET service_name SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day

pages.name: Cost by Service
pages.description: Per-service cost breakdown with daily granularity

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.summary.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 20
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.summary.service_cost`) AS 'Cost (USD)' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'summary' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 50
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonRoute53' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonBedrock' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonCloudWatch' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonS3' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AWSSecretsManager' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonApiGateway' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AWSLambda' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonDynamoDB' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonCloudFront' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AmazonStates' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'awskms' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.daily.service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'daily-costs' AND service = 'AWSGlue' SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day

pages.name: Cost by Tag
pages.description: Cost breakdown by application tag and uncategorized resources

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.app_total_cost`) AS 'Tagged', sum(`aws.cur.tag.uncategorized_total`) AS 'Untagged' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.uncategorized_total`) AS 'Untagged Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.app_total_cost`) AS 'Tagged Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' SINCE 2 days ago
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.app_total_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' FACET application SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 20
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.app_total_cost`) AS 'Cost (USD)' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' FACET application SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 50
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.uncategorized_service`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 20
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.uncategorized_service`) AS 'Cost (USD)' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' FACET service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 50

widgets.title: Tagged App Cost — by Service (within app)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.tag.app_service_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-tag' FACET application, service_name SINCE 2 days ago LIMIT 30

pages.name: Granular Usage
pages.description: Per-service per-region usage quantity and blended vs unblended cost from costs.json

widgets.title: Unblended vs Blended Cost by Service

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.service.unblended_cost`) AS 'Unblended', sum(`aws.cur.service.blended_cost`) AS 'Blended' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs' FACET service_name SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.service.usage_quantity`) AS 'Usage' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs' FACET service_name SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.service.unblended_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs' FACET region SINCE 30 days ago LIMIT 20
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.service.unblended_cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs' FACET date, service_name, region SINCE 30 days ago LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Cost by Usage Group — All Services (daily)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago LIMIT 30
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost (USD)' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' FACET service_name, usage_group SINCE 30 days ago LIMIT 50

SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' AND service = 'AmazonBedrock' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' AND service = 'AWSLambda' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' AND service = 'AmazonS3' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day

SELECT sum(`aws.cur.usage_group.cost`) AS 'Cost $' FROM Metric WHERE source = 'cur' AND file = 'costs-by-usage-group' AND service = 'AmazonCloudWatch' FACET usage_group SINCE 30 days ago TIMESERIES 1 day
